## Validation
- [ ] dotnet build {{ProjectName}}.slnx --configuration Release
- [ ] dotnet test Tests/Api.Tests/Api.Tests.csproj --configuration Release
- [ ] dotnet test Tests/Shared.Tests/Shared.Tests.csproj --configuration Release
- [ ] Manual verification completed where relevant

## UI Evidence
<!-- Screenshots/GIFs if the frontend changed -->

## Deployment / Risk Notes
<!-- Migrations, config changes, secrets, rollout concerns -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows AGENTS.md conventions
- [ ] Uses verb-first API/service naming
- [ ] Keeps changes scoped and avoids unrelated modifications
- [ ] Updates documentation if behavior changed

## Commit Convention
Format: `Project - What has been done`
Example: `Api - Added user registration endpoint`
